title: East Yorkshire Solar Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Boom Power for the construction, operation and maintenance, and decommissioning of a solar photovoltaic array electricity generating station, and associated infrastructure.    Date of decision   9 May 2025  Company / location   Unit 5E Park FarmChichester RoadArundelWest SussexBN18 0AG   Type of project   Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.   Maximum output   Up to 400MW. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
